title: Senior Fullstack Engineer / AI
company_focus: Business growth operating system supported by software
description:
We are Bloom Growth™—a business growth operating system
supported by software.  Our proven ecosystem is designed to
lead your business on a journey to exponential growth. We
provide a thriving environment that nurtures every aspect of
your business’s development. This position is 100% remote,
actually, our entire company is fully remote!

About the role

As a Senior Fullstack Software Engineer, AI at Bloom Growth,
you will design and deliver intelligent systems that power
our platform and enhance the customer experience. This role
blends fullstack development with a focus on backend and AI
systems, building client-facing capabilities that are
scalable and reliable. You’ll partner closely with product
and cross-functional teams to turn business needs into high-
quality engineering outcomes. Your work will directly impact
product quality, user experience, and our continued growth.

What you'll do

- Design and deploy scalable AI models and intelligent system
  features
- Build and support backend systems powering AI-driven
  functionality
- Establish and scale MLOps practices for production AI
  solutions
- Partner with product and cross-functional teams to deliver
  impactful solutions
- Ship iterative improvements using agile methodologies and
  real-world feedback
- Leverage AI tools to accelerate development and improve
  workflows
- Maintain high standards for code quality, reliability, and
  scalability
- Champion DevOps practices including CI/CD and system
  monitoring

QualificationsRequired:

- Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience
- 5+ years of software engineering experience
- 2+ years building and scaling AI solutions in production
- Experience developing client-facing AI capabilities
- Strong backend and data systems experience
- Hands-on experience with cloud, CI/CD, and containerization
- Strong communication skills in a remote environment

Preferred:

- Experience leading projects or mentoring engineers
- Experience with RAG, prompt systems, or AI evaluation
  frameworks
- Experience in SaaS or B2B environments
- Experience with AI tools (e.g., Copilot, Claude Code)

Compensation

The expected base salary range for this role is
$150,000–$190,000 USD, depending on experience, skills,
qualifications, and geographic location. Bloom Growth™
follows an equitable, market-aligned compensation philosophy
to ensure fairness and consistency across our fully remote
team.

Benefits

- 100% remote work environment
- Medical, dental, vision, and life insurance
- 401(k) with employer match (immediate eligibility)
- Unlimited PTO
- Paid parental leave
- Professional development opportunities
- Company-paid holidays

Hiring Process

Our hiring process includes five steps designed to be
transparent and respectful of your time:

- Predictive Index assessment
- Initial interview
- Conversation with the hiring manager
- Role-specific assessment
- Panel/team interview
- Leadership team interview

Location Eligibility

This role is open to candidates permanently residing in the
United States, excluding California and New York. Bloom
Growth™ adjusts compensation based on geographic market data
to maintain internal equity.

Application Window

Applications will remain open until the position is filled.
Priority consideration is given to candidates who apply
within the first two weeks of posting.

How to Apply

We receive a high volume of applications and review each one
carefully. To help us understand your experience, please
include:

- Your LinkedIn profile
- A brief cover letter (1–3 short paragraphs)

Thoughtful and authentic responses are valued. Please write
this in your own voice.

In your cover letter, please share:

- Briefly describe an AI-powered feature you’ve built and
  deployed. What problem did it solve, and what was your
  role?

A Bit About Us

We’re a fully remote team committed to openness,
helpfulness, continual learning, and honest communication.
These values shape how we work together and how we support
the clients who use our business growth operating system.

Equal Opportunity

Bloom Growth™ is an equal opportunity employer committed to
creating an inclusive and respectful workplace. All
employment decisions are made without regard to protected
characteristics in accordance with applicable laws. We
participate in E-Verify and require all employees to
complete the I-9 verification process upon hire.

This position utilizes automated tools to assist in matching
candidate qualifications to job requirements. By applying,
you acknowledge that AI may be used to screen your resume
for the qualifications listed above.

ai_classification_reasoning:

models, building backend systems powering AI-driven
functionality, and establishing MLOps practices. The
candidate needs 2+ years building and scaling AI solutions
in production, with preferred experience in RAG, prompt
systems, and AI evaluation frameworks — indicating hands-on
work building and deploying AI/ML systems.
